context: Agent must update TypeScript JSDoc for return type changes while preserving README propose-only discipline. Baseline models often rewrite README prose directly instead of proposing changes.

checklist.name: JSDoc return type updated
checklist.description: The @returns JSDoc tag reflects the new Config return type instead of the old string type

checklist.name: README not auto-written
checklist.description: The report does NOT contain 'Here is the updated README.md' or 'I updated README.md' — all markdown changes are propose-only

checklist.name: Unified report format used
checklist.description: The output contains '## Doc Sync Report' as the top-level heading
